title: Tap tree
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Tap-tree.jpg|thumb|Morgan Katarn's tap tree on Sulon]]
'''Tap trees''' were [[Plant/Legends|plants]] that grew on [[Sulon/Legends|Sulon]]. They grew long roots that siphoned large amounts of [[Water/Legends|water]] up from [[aquifer]]s deep below the soil, more than they, or their symbiotes, can use.<ref name="RA">''[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent]]''</ref>

The Sulonese farmers made use of this [[Tree/Legends|trees']] property to bring water up to the surface for their crops, more or less like natural "pumps". For this to function, they had built an irrigation system of pipes and tubes distributing moisture around a [[farm/Legends|farm]], accessed by tunnels and maintained by [[droid/Legends|droids]].<ref name="RA" />

Like his neighbors, [[Morgan Katarn]] made use of tap trees along with the underground network under his [[Katarn estate|farm]], with access doors to the tunnels at several points.<ref name="RA" /> The tree in the front of the [[Katarn family compound|Katarn homestead]] was over a thousand [[Standard year/Legends|years]] old.

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent]]''
*[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent (audio drama)|''Dark Forces: Rebel Agent'' audio drama]]
